summary: Iteration 2 regression test for FAMMY AI backend after 50+ frontend changes. Per request, ONLY backend was tested (frontend skipped — Supabase Google OAuth cannot be automated). Re-ran the 14 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py against the production preview URL. ALL 14 TESTS PASSED in 73s. Health (200, mongo ok), /api/ai/suggest-task (3 Italian titles correctly classified: 'Pagare bolletta luce'->spese/admin, 'Comprare il latte'->home, 'Visita dentista'->health), /api/ai/weekly-summary (Italian summary + highlights array, also handles minimal payload), /api/ai/chat (single-turn + multi-turn context preserved across same session_id — assistant correctly recalls 'Tommaso, 6 anni' on turn 2 — plus /history endpoint returns 4 messages in correct user/assistant/user/assistant order with no mongo _id leak), /api/ai/gift-ideas (>=3 ideas for Nonna Maria with non-empty title/description/price_range). No backend regressions detected from the 50+ frontend changes — backend code (/app/backend/server.py) is unchanged from iteration 1.

minor.issue: Carried over from iteration 1 — sort('created_at', -1).to_list(10) now correctly returns the latest 10 user messages (this was already fixed). However, only user turns are replayed into the fresh LlmChat; assistant turns are not. Works fine for fact recall (verified) but tone may drift in very long sessions.
Empty title still accepted by Pydantic (no min_length). Returns 200 with category='other'. Not a regression — pre-existing behaviour.

allow_origins=['*'] + allow_credentials=True is not spec-compliant. Browsers will reject credentialed requests. Not blocking since Supabase frontend uses anon key in body, but should be tightened pre-prod.

action_items: No action required for backend — all endpoints healthy, Italian language correctly returned on all 4 AI routes.
Optional: tighten CORS, add Field(min_length=1) on titles/messages (carry-over from iter 1).

Frontend changes (PWA prompts, modals, FAB pulse, donation, feedback inbox) were NOT verified — they sit behind Google OAuth which cannot be automated. The Italian user (Raffael) must manually verify these features after Google sign-in.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 417 lines — still well under the 700-line threshold but each AI endpoint duplicates try/except + extract_json + session-id boilerplate. Extracting a run_llm_json(system, user_text, session_prefix) helper would DRY routes 2-4.

All four endpoints catch broad Exception and return 500 with the raw exception string in `detail`. This can leak internal info (API key fragments, mongo connection strings on certain failures). Recommend: log the exception internally, return a generic public message.
No request-level timeout on LlmChat.send_message: a hanging upstream call will pin a uvicorn worker. Wrap with asyncio.wait_for(..., timeout=N).

extract_json regex uses non-greedy {.*?} in the fenced-code branch but greedy {.*} in the fallback. With nested JSON (highlights as array of objects) the fenced branch may stop at first inner }. Consider a brace-balancing parser.

Chat replay does NOT include assistant turns (only user turns are re-sent). Fine for current usage but worth documenting in the endpoint docstring so future contributors don't assume full conversation replay.

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per request — Google OAuth blocks automation)

test_credentials: Not applicable to backend. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in /app/backend/.env works correctly with anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929. Frontend requires Supabase Google OAuth (real Google account on jwzoymvtxjzpymaywjtw.supabase.co) — cannot be automated.
seed_data_creation: Tests created chat_messages docs with user_id prefix 'TEST_user_' and session_ids 'TEST_session_*' / 'TEST_hist_*'. Cleaned up after run: db.chat_messages.deleteMany({user_id: /^TEST_/}) removed 20 documents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend AI endpoints remain fully green across iterations 1 and 2. The 50+ frontend changes did NOT regress any backend behaviour (backend code is unchanged). If new backend AI features are added, extend /app/backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py following the same TestX class pattern. Multi-turn chat assertion uses 'tommaso' substring (lowercase) in turn-2 reply. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is loaded from /app/frontend/.env via dotenv_values since Vite doesn't export it to the shell. Frontend regression for the 50+ UI changes (PWA prompts, modals, FAB pulse, donation flow, feedback inbox, ?reset=1 escape hatch) CANNOT be automated and must be verified by the user in a real browser logged into Google.
rca of the issue: No bugs in this iteration. All 14 backend tests pass on first run in 73s.
